name: Deborah Fletcher
body: Your daughter's heart is precious. Praying for her and your family.

name: Natalie Rynard
body: We will continue praying Lee! Your words are so moving, I can not possibly imagine what you guys are going through but I know you can feel the power of prayer from family and friends far and near. We will pray. Hard. Much love to you and your family

name: DeShanna Kennard
body: Ps34:18 The LORD is close to the brokenhearted and saves those who are crushed in spirit.

name: DeShanna Kennard
body: No words are adequate. Praying 🙏 I'm just so sorry y'all are going through this.

name: Julie Hickman
body: I set my alarm for noon to remind me to pray specifically each day for your family. We don’t know what tomorrow brings, but we know who holds tomorrow. Jeremiah 29:11

name: Julie Hickman
body: I set my alarm for noon to remind me to pray specifically each day for your family. We don’t know what tomorrow brings, but we know who holds tomorrow. Jeremiah 29:11

name: Patty Klopfenstein
body: All of you are in my prayers and thoughts every day. We love you very much. Uncle Dan and Aunt Patty

name: Mills Nicole
body: My heart is breaking for you all of you. I think about Lyla every time I drive by the school, hoping she's having a good day. I have and will continue to pray for you guys. Hopefully she will be able to be home soon and for the holidays coming up. You are the sweetest girl Lyla. 🩷 Ms. Nicole

name: Michael Dawn Anderson
body: You all are in our prayers.❤️

name: Linda Share
body: Praying for your sweet Lyla and for your family.

name: Leigh Cuppy
body: I will go to bed with all of you in my heart and prayers.

name: Judy Nichols
body: My heart is aching with you. :-( Praying with you for your sweet, trusting daughter.

name: Ashley Phillips
body: Praying daily. 🥺 I love her sweet prayers.
